title: What Strategy Actually Is
shortSummary: Strategy is not a business plan, a vision statement, or a to-do list. It is a set of integrated choices about where to play and how to win.
whyItMatters: Without strategy, you are just reacting to whatever happens. Strategy gives you a framework for saying no to good opportunities so you can focus on great ones.
coreConcepts: Strategy is about choices — what you will and will not do
Good strategy has a diagnosis, a guiding policy, and coherent actions
Competitive advantage is not permanent — it must be maintained and evolved
The best strategies are simple enough to explain in one sentence
